ideation: This animation sequence portrays a bride gently adjusting her veil, a subtle yet elegant gesture. The movement will focus on the right arm, while the left remains at the side for balance. The sequence will begin with both arms at rest, then the right arm will lift to adjust the veil, and finally return to rest. I will use the robot's two joints to create the natural flow of movement. The wrist will be used to adjust the final pose, and the movement will stay within the robot's range of motion, as in the examples. Frame 1 starts with both arms at rest. Frame 2 initiates the movement of the right arm toward the veil, with the wrist angled slightly outward. Frame 3 shows the right arm adjusting the veil. Frame 4 returns the arm to the neutral position.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, poised and still
the right arm lifts gently, hand turning outward
fingers delicately adjust an unseen veil
the right arm returns to a relaxed side position
